ddls:
CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade associated with the position */,
  "side" TEXT /* Direction of the position (long/short) */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Entry price of the position */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the position */,
  "liquidation_price" REAL /* Liquidation price of the position */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current market price of the asset */,
  "unrealized_pnl" REAL /* Unrealized profit or loss on the position */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the position (open/closed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the position was created */,
  "asset" TEXT /* The cryptocurrency asset of the position */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The external exchange where the position is held */,
  "leverage" REAL /* The leverage used in the position */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* The trading strategy associated with the position */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user who holds the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last login timestamp of the user */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The API key for accessing external exchanges */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* The API secret for accessing external exchanges */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the executed trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who executed the trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., execute, cancel) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details regarding the action performed */,
  "asset" TEXT /* The cryptocurrency asset associated with the trade history */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The external exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* The trading strategy associated with the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade associated with the fee */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of fee paid for the trade */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., transaction fee, withdrawal fee) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fee was recorded */,
  "asset" TEXT /* The cryptocurrency asset associated with the fee */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The external exchange where the fee was charged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "asset" TEXT /* Name of the asset (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "price" REAL /* Market price of the asset */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the price was recorded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The external exchange where the price was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liquidations" (
  "liq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liquidation record */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position that was liquidated */,
  "liq_price" REAL /* Liquidation price at which the position was liquidated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the liquidation event */,
  "asset" TEXT /* The cryptocurrency asset associated with the liquidation */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The external exchange where the liquidation occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("liq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_liquidations_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the strategy is currently active */,
  "last_executed_at" TEXT /* The last timestamp when the strategy was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "asset" TEXT /* Name of the asset for which the alert is set */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The external exchange where the alert is set */,
  "last_triggered_at" TEXT /* The last timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "type" TEXT /* The type of notification (e.g., trade, alert, liquidation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
